title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, list, pull, push models.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client and asyncio bindings for Ollama; chat, generate, embeddings, tool calling.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models as LLM or embeddings in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, models, RAG, admin) installable via Docker.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API; chat, generate, pull, list, delete models.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem wrapping Ollama REST API; chat, generate, embed, list, pull models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI for chatting with Ollama models, history, prompts library.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models as Copilot alternative with inline autocomplete.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and model auto-pull.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images and Docker Compose examples for CPU/GPU Ollama setups.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Lightweight React chatbot component that plugs into local Ollama instance via ollama-js.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix package derivation for Ollama enabling reproducible installs on NixOS.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation template using Ollama + ChromaDB + LangChain in Python.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models through slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot integration for Ollama providing /ollama chat commands in workspaces.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts via Ollama on notes and selections.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app + REST API wrapper around Ollama for multi-user chat with token quotas.

title: ollama-qt
summary: Cross-platform desktop GUI for Ollama written in Python Qt with chat history and model manager.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.
